done_summary:
Successfully extracted all 20 fields from the Veridyne Networks Q3 FY2026 press release into `/workspace/extraction_results.json`. 

Key results:
- All 20 schema fields were found and extracted with correct types (string, integer, number, date)
- All values are in the documented units (USD millions, percent, etc.)
- Date fields are in ISO 8601 format (2026-02-28, 2026-01-22)
- Integer fields have no decimal points
- No uncertain fields — all values were directly stated in the press release
- Notable extraction decisions: used the stated $710M ARR figure (despite "exceeded" qualifier), used positive $9.8M for non-GAAP operating income (not the loss figure), and used the raised guidance range ($722-$726M) for FY2026 revenue guidance

Also produced `/workspace/notes.md` with detailed field-by-field extraction documentation.
